task: Implement Phase II Evolution Upgrades: Multi-Agent Swarm & Vector RAG Memory
pattern: Circular dependency module loading cycles in large Node.js / TypeScript codebases can render imported graph node values as 'undefined' at boot. Wrapping node references inside functional arrow executors (e.g. `(state) => node(state)`) delays valuation until execution, permanently bypassing startup crashes.
logic_shift: Shifted from direct load-time static graph registrations to lazy arrow-wrapper graph registrations, ensuring complete circular module loading robustness in multi-agent routing topologies.
